chapter_title.en: Chapter 82 – The abhorrence of the timing (of the re-appearance of Imam Al Mahdi<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/175)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/175)
text: قُلْتُ لِهَذَا الْأَمْرِ وَقْتٌ فَقَالَ كَذَبَ الْوَقَّاتُونَ كَذَبَ الْوَقَّاتُونَ كَذَبَ الْوَقَّاتُونَ إِنَّ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) لَمَّا خَرَجَ وَافِداً إِلَى رَبِّهِ وَاعَدَهُمْ ثَلَاثِينَ يَوْماً فَلَمَّا زَادَهُ اللَّهُ عَلَى الثَّلَاثِينَ عَشْراً قَالَ قَوْمُهُ قَدْ أَخْلَفَنَا مُوسَى فَصَنَعُوا مَا صَنَعُوا فَإِذَا حَدَّثْنَاكُمُ الْحَدِيثَ فَجَاءَ عَلَى مَا حَدَّثْنَاكُمْ بِهِ فَقُولُوا صَدَقَ اللَّهُ وَ إِذَا حَدَّثْنَاكُمُ الْحَدِيثَ فَجَاءَ عَلَى خِلَافِ مَا حَدَّثْنَاكُمْ بِهِ فَقُولُوا صَدَقَ اللَّهُ تُؤْجَرُوا مَرَّتَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Al Khazzaz, from Abdul Kareem Bin Amro Al Khash’amy, from Al Fuzayl Bin Yasaar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said, ‘Is there a (specific) time for this matter?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The timers would be lying! The timers would be lying! The timers would be lying! When (Prophet) Musa<sup>as</sup> went as a delegate to his<sup>as</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup>, his<sup>as</sup> appointment was for thirty days. So when Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Increased ten upon the thirty, his<sup>as</sup> people said, ‘Musa<sup>as</sup> has broken his<sup>as</sup> promise’. Thus, they did what they did. So when we<sup>asws</sup> narrate to you all with the Hadeeth and there comes what we<sup>asws</sup> had narrated with, so you should be saying, ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Spoke the truth’. And when we<sup>asws</sup> narrated to you all with the Hadeeth, so there comes different to what we<sup>asws</sup> had narrated to you with, so you should be saying, ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Spoke the truth’. You would be Recompensed twice’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn mmd has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali al-Khazzaz from ‘Abd al-Karim ibn ‘Umar al-Khath‘ami from al-Fadl ibn Yasar who has said the following. “I asked abu Ja’far (a.s.), ‘Is there a definite time for this matter (the rise of al-Mahdi with Divine Authority)?” He said, “Those who set a definite time have lied, those who set a definite time have lied, those who set a definite time have lied. When Musa (Moses) came out to delegate before his lord and gave the people a definite time for his return and Allah added an other ten days his people said, ‘He has broken his promise.’” They then did what they did. When we say a hadith (make a statement to you) and if our hadith comes true you should say, “Allah has spoken the truth.” If we say a hadith to you ( make a statement) and if doe not come true, you should say, “Allah has spoken the truth.” You will be rewarded twice.”
